commonIssues:
Due to high penalty points (12+ in two years) for traffic violations (no helmet/seatbelt, rash driving), many face temporary license suspension and vehicle seizure.

How to fix: Telangana strictly enforces a penalty point system. Check your points via the TS Traffic Police portal. Avoiding minor offenses like helmetless riding is the only way to avoid rapid accumulation of points.

Unpaid fines result in the blocking of RTA services (Duplicate DL, Renewals) and seizure of license/RC.

How to fix: Download the "T-App Folio" or visit the TS e-Challan portal. View and pay all pending violations linked to your Aadhaar/DL/Vehicle Number before initiating any RTA service request.

Heavy penalties and counseling are enforced on parents or guardians of minors found driving, alongside strict police drives.

How to fix: Under the MV Act section 199A, parents of minors caught driving can face 3 years jail and ₹25,000 fine. Secure keys safely, and only apply for proper LLs (MC50CC) for those aged 16+.

Applicants face difficulties in the slot booking system, long waiting times, or issues navigating the online TS Transport portal for renewals or duplicates.

How to fix: Skip the busy website and use the official **T-App Folio** mobile application for a smoother booking experience. Ensure your mobile number is properly linked to your Aadhaar for OTP verification.
